query:
SELECT m.name, 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN cd.votingMethod = 'direct' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as direct,
  SUM(CASE WHEN cd.votingMethod = 'delegate' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as delegate,
  SUM(CASE WHEN cd.votingMethod = 'citizen' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as citizen
FROM ministries m
LEFT JOIN citizenDelegates cd ON m.id = cd.ministryId
GROUP BY m.id, m.name
ORDER BY m.name

FROM ministries m
LEFT JOIN citizenDelegates cd ON m.id = cd.ministryId
